---
name: Spec proposal (new feature or breaking change)
about: Propose an addition or breaking change to the SBP wire protocol
title: "[RFC] "
labels: spec, rfc
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this proposal solve? Why does it need to be in the protocol
rather than in a vendor extension?

## Proposed change

Describe the change to the wire format, endpoint semantics, or frame catalog.
Include example JSON snippets.

## Conformance level

Which conformance level would this affect, or would it introduce a new level?

## Backwards compatibility

Is this additive (new OPTIONAL field) or breaking (changes existing normative
behavior)?

## Prior art

Has MCP, OpenAI, or any existing spec addressed this? How?

## Reference implementation

Which file(s) in the reference server would need to change?

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read GOVERNANCE.md and understand the comment period requirement.
- [ ] I am willing to submit a reference-server PR alongside the spec change.
- [ ] I have considered the impact on implementations that do not upgrade immediately.
